member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.ElasticMappingResolver.RefreshMapping
member.summary: Clears the cached mapping, forcing a fresh fetch from the server on the next access.
member.remarks: Mappings are automatically refreshed at most once per minute. This method bypasses that throttle and is primarily useful in unit tests where index mappings change rapidly. In production, the automatic refresh is typically sufficient.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.ElasticMappingResolver.GetServerMapping
member.returns: true if a new mapping was fetched and applied; false if throttled or unavailable.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.ElasticQueryParser.ParseAsync(System.String,Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext)
member.remarks: This override applies Elasticsearch-specific visitor pipelines (query, aggregation, sort) after parsing. If a occurs during visitor processing, the error is captured in the context's validation result and the method returns null rather than throwing. This dual-mode design allows callers like ValidateQueryAsync to inspect errors without exception handling, while callers like BuildQueryAsync explicitly check for null and throw.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.NestedFilterResolver
member.summary: Resolves an optional filter to inject inside nested queries, aggregations, and sorts. Called for each nested field node that is not inside an explicit nested group, and once for each explicit nested group node during visitor traversal. Return null to skip filtering for a given field.
member.param: The field name before alias resolution (from GetOriginalField()).
The field name after alias resolution (the current node.Field).
The visitor context, providing Data dictionary for arbitrary state.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Extensions.DefaultQueryNodeExtensions.GetDefaultQuery(Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.TermNode,Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Visitors.IQueryVisitorContext)
member.summary: Synchronous compatibility shim. Prefer for async nested filter resolution.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.NestedPathResolver
member.summary: Shared helper for resolving nested path chains from a fully-qualified field name. Centralizes logic previously duplicated in NestedVisitor, CombineAggregationsVisitor, DefaultSortNodeExtensions, and DefaultQueryNodeExtensions.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.NestedPathResolver.GetNestedAggName(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the standard nested aggregation name for a given path (e.g., "parent" becomes "nested_parent").

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.NestedPathResolver.GetDeepestNestedPath(System.String,Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.ElasticMappingResolver)
member.summary: Returns the deepest nested path for a given fully-qualified field name, or null if no nested property is found in the path segments.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.NestedPathResolver.GetNestedPathChain(System.String,Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.ElasticMappingResolver)
member.summary: Returns the complete chain of nested paths from outermost to innermost for a given deepest nested path. Each entry in the returned list is a path prefix that resolves to a nested mapping type.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.CombineAggregationsVisitor.GetLeafFieldNodes(Foundatio.Parsers.LuceneQueries.Nodes.GroupNode)
member.summary: Collects all leaf IFieldQueryNode descendants in the same order as the original recursive post-order visitor. In a right-recursive AST, the Right subtree is processed via recursion before the Left child is yielded at each level. GroupNodes with a Field (explicit nested groups) are returned as-is.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.CombineAggregationsVisitor.BucketPathSeparator
member.summary: Elasticsearch bucket path separator character used to traverse nested aggregation hierarchy (e.g., "nested_parent>nested_parent.child>terms_field").

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext
member.summary: Extends with Elasticsearch-specific configuration.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext.DefaultTimeZone
member.summary: Provides the default timezone for date queries when not explicitly specified.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext.UseScoring
member.summary: Whether to use scoring queries (query context) instead of filters (filter context).

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext.MappingResolver
member.summary: Resolves field names to their Elasticsearch mapping definitions.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext.RuntimeFields
member.summary: Runtime fields to include in the search request.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext.EnableRuntimeFieldResolver
member.summary: Whether to automatically resolve unmapped fields as runtime fields.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticQueries.Visitors.IElasticQueryVisitorContext.RuntimeFieldResolver
member.summary: Resolves field names to runtime field definitions for dynamic field support.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.RuntimeFieldResolver
member.summary: Resolves a field name to an Elasticsearch runtime field definition.
member.returns: The runtime field definition, or null if the field should not be a runtime field.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticRuntimeField
member.summary: Defines an Elasticsearch runtime field for dynamic field computation.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticRuntimeField.Name
member.summary: The name of the runtime field.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticRuntimeField.FieldType
member.summary: The data type of the runtime field.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticRuntimeField.Script
member.summary: The Painless script that computes the field value.
member.remarks: When null, Elasticsearch evaluates the field from the mapping without a script.

member.name: T:Foundatio.Parsers.ElasticRuntimeFieldType
member.summary: Supported data types for Elasticsearch runtime fields.

member.name: M:Nest.ElasticMapping.AddKeywordField``1(Nest.TextPropertyDescriptor{``0})
member.summary: Not chainable with AddSortField. Use AddKeywordAndSortFields to add both.

member.name: M:Nest.ElasticMapping.AddKeywordField``1(Nest.TextPropertyDescriptor{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Not chainable with AddSortField. Use AddKeywordAndSortFields to add both.

member.name: M:Nest.ElasticMapping.AddKeywordField``1(Nest.TextPropertyDescriptor{``0},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Not chainable with AddSortField. Use AddKeywordAndSortFields to add both.

member.name: M:Nest.ElasticMapping.AddSortField``1(Nest.TextPropertyDescriptor{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Not chainable with AddKeywordField. Use AddKeywordAndSortFields to add both.
